verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Love is more than just a pretty word to say When the Father gave His Son upon the cross one day. And all the finest songs could never take The place of a cup Of water giving in His name.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The world will know the tomb is empty When they see our hearts are full They will know that He is living When He lives in me and you. The world will know who holds tomorrow When we holds to Him today The world will know, the world will know

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We are living bibles read of all men And we can show The world that He's alive again. There's no better way for them To see His plan than to see Our lives completely in His hands

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Show them, show them Show the world You know Him Not in just the word you say But the way you live
